responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix Samsung Android chat keyboard failure on `chat.ivxholding.com/home`, fix Android OTA crash (`java.io.IOException: Failed to download remote update`), and build a working release APK

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; convert to local only for display
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically ‚Äî manual email + password required on every launch
- App colors must match landing page ‚Äî `#FFD700` gold, `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork dependencies
- Birthday field REQUIRED (MM/DD/YYYY, age 18-120, stored as `dateOfBirth` ISO YYYY-MM-DD)
- Gender field REQUIRED ‚Äî chip selector: Male / Female / Prefer not to say
- Landing QA: do not mark production ready because routes return 200; require live evidence
- Expo Go: do not create new project, do not run create-expo-app, do not remove production modules
- CORS must allow only: `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, approved local dev origins
- GitHub pushes require orphan branch technique to exclude `.rork/history/` files with secrets
- Use `bunx` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- Samsung keyboard fix must use `visualViewport` API, `touch-action: manipulation`, `user-select: text`, `100dvh`/`100svh` viewport units
- EAS credentials (`EXPO_TOKEN`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID`) NOT available ‚Äî user confirmed they don't have them

## Progress
### Done
- **Owner auto-login removal FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**: Commits `c67f8a2`, `e831c8d`, `e936eef`; 3 auto-login paths blocked in `auth-context.tsx`
- **Owner sign-in fix FULLY DEPLOYED ‚Äî USER CONFIRMED WORKING**: Commit `d6dbfce` ‚Üí GitHub `43be880c`
- **App color alignment DEPLOYED**: 784 hardcoded colors replaced across 104 Expo files
- **Enterprise Time Zone System DEPLOYED**: 69/69 tests pass, 17/17 API endpoints verified, 8 cities + DST verified
- **Reels card redesigned DEPLOYED**: commit `730aa4d`
- **Chat UX fixes DEPLOYED AND E2E VERIFIED**: commit `c0470a3`, 5/5 messages OK
- **IVX Registration Redesign DEPLOYED**: `IVXAuthCard.tsx` (~1900 lines), `expo/app/auth.tsx`
- **Birthday field DEPLOYED**: Backend validation 4/4 scenarios pass
- **Gender field DEPLOYED**: `GENDER_OPTIONS` chip selector, `VALID_GENDERS` Set in backend
- **Landing page 20-section QA completed ‚Äî fixes deployed and verified**
- **Final closeout commit `3abaa17` DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED LIVE on Render**:
  - Backend SHA `3abaa17f` matches GitHub `3abaa17` (boot `2026-07-13T01:07:23.342Z`)
  - CORS: `access-control-allow-origin: https://ivxholding.com` (not `*`) ‚Äî verified live
  - All routes 200: `/health`, `/api/ivx/properties/featured`, `/api/ivx/jv-deals`, `/api/landing-config`, `/api/ivx/analytics`
  - Protected routes: `/api/ivx/members` without auth ‚Üí 401; Rate limiting: 5‚Üí401, 6th‚Üí429
  - Signup E2E: `userId=e39c1586-5560-4887-b707-f9512afa2a83` created successfully
- **Samsung chat keyboard fix DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED LIVE on `chat.ivxholding.com`**:
  - New bundle `entry-e11d8407f1045ab2380c1af32601e346.js` deployed `2026-07-13T01:47:24 UTC`
  - All keyboard fix functions confirmed in LIVE production bundle: `useWebKeyboard`, `injectWebKeyboardCSS`, `ivx-web-keyboard-fix`, `scrollInputIntoView`, `WebkitUserSelect`, `touchAction: 'manipulation'`, `visualViewport`
  - `chat.ivxholding.com/home` returns HTTP 200, `cf-cache-status: EXPIRED`
  - Backend healthy at `api.ivxholding.com/health`
  - Committed as `4573329`, pushed to GitHub as SHA `8ce4706` via orphan branch technique
  - Created `expo/hooks/useWebKeyboard.ts` (NEW): VisualViewport API hook, `injectWebKeyboardCSS()`, `scrollInputIntoView()`
  - Modified 5 files: `app/_layout.tsx`, `InvestorSupportChat.tsx`, `app/chat-hub.tsx`, `src/modules/chat/components/Composer.tsx`, `app/ivx/chat.tsx`
- **Android OTA crash repair ‚Äî CODE AND CONFIG COMPLETE, COMMITTED**:
  - Root cause: Old APK built with `updates.enabled: true` + `checkAutomatically: 'ON_LOAD'` ‚Äî native `expo-updates` tries to download manifest from dead/unreachable update URL, crashes before JS loads
  - Fixed `eas.json`: Added explicit channels (`development`, `preview`, `production`); removed invalid `ascTeamId` field that was blocking `eas project:info`
  - Fixed `app.config.ts`: version `1.2.1` ‚Üí `1.3.0`, added `runtimeVersion: { policy: 'appVersion' }`, `updates.enabled: false`, `updates.checkAutomatically: 'NEVER'`, `android.versionCode: 1` ‚Üí `2`, updated `buildMarker` to `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_13_OTA_REPAIR`
  - Created `expo/lib/ota-error-handler.ts` (190 lines): `safelyCheckForUpdates()` ‚Äî never throws, records diagnostics (updateId, channel, runtimeVersion, timestamp) to AsyncStorage, catches all import/check/fetch errors
  - Rewrote `expo/lib/app-update-checker.ts` (34 lines): calls `safelyCheckForUpdates()`, wraps in try/catch, non-fatal
  - Modified `app/_layout.tsx`: calls `checkForUpdates()` in `useEffect` with `.catch()` ‚Äî non-blocking background check
  - TypeScript passes with zero errors for new/modified files
  - Committed as `3e501cd` on `main`, pushed to origin (Rork internal)
  - `expo-updates@~0.26.0` was installed then REMOVED ‚Äî caused Kotlin version conflict in native build (expo-updates-gradle-plugin needs Kotlin 1.9.0, RN gradle plugin compiled with Kotlin 2.1.0); JS-level dynamic import in `ota-error-handler.ts` gracefully handles missing module
- **Expo Go repair Steps 1-9 COMPLETED (server-side)**:
  - Root cause was stale/dead tunnel URL ‚Äî Metro had been killed but phone kept trying old URL
  - Manifest "returns HTML" was a TESTING ERROR ‚Äî missing `expo-platform: android` header in curl test
  - New tunnel `exp://k9xajm4-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` LIVE and verified: manifest 200 JSON, bundle 200 (37.6MB), 5/5 stability checks passed
  - Deferred owner AI watchdog, incident capture, text-node-guard from startup to 3s after boot in `app/_layout.tsx`
- **APK local build IN PROGRESS ‚Äî Metro bundle completed, in final packaging**:
  - `expo prebuild --platform android --clean --no-install` succeeded (local Expo CLI 54.0.25)
  - Native Android project generated: `android/` with `gradlew`, build-tools 36.0.0, NDK 27.1.12297006, compileSdk 36, minSdk 24, targetSdk 36, Kotlin 2.1.20
  - Metro bundler completed: 3837 modules in 38s, bundle written to `app/build/generated/assets/createBundleReleaseJsAndAssets/index.android.bundle`
  - Build running as PID 5518, log at `/tmp/gradle-build3.log`, PID file `/tmp/gradle-pid3.txt`
  - Build dir ~228MB, no errors, no FAILED tasks
  - Build is past lint analysis, in final `:app` tasks (generateReleaseResValues, mergeReleaseNativeDebugMetadata, etc.)

### In Progress
- **APK release build running**: `./gradlew assembleRelease --no-daemon` (PID 5518, started ~11:20 UTC) ‚Äî Metro done, native compilation done, in final APK packaging tasks
- **Samsung real device keyboard test**: need to verify keyboard opens on Samsung Internet at `chat.ivxholding.com/home` ‚Äî fix is live but needs real device confirmation
- **Expo Go device verification (Steps 10-13)**: waiting for owner to scan new QR code `exp://k9xajm4-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` on updated Expo Go

### Blocked
- **EAS credentials not available**: `EXPO_TOKEN` and `EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID` not set ‚Äî user confirmed they don't have them; cannot use `eas build` or `eas update`
- **GitHub remote not configured**: Only `origin` (Rork internal git router) exists ‚Äî no `github` remote; orphan branch push to GitHub failed; local commit `3e501cd` is on `main` pushed to origin but NOT pushed to GitHub
- **www.ivxholding.com does not 301 redirect to ivxholding.com** ‚Äî requires Cloudflare DNS/page rule change
- **404 returns 200 on ivxholding.com** ‚Äî S3 SPA fallback serves index.html for all paths; requires CloudFront Lambda edge function
- **Landing HTML not redeployed to S3** ‚Äî AWS credentials not available in cloud sandbox
- **Device QA (Android, iPhone, desktop) NOT VERIFIED** ‚Äî requires physical devices
- **CSP HTTP header not applied on S3** ‚Äî S3 serves static HTML without security headers
- **Bundle size 37.6MB not reducible below 15MB** ‚Äî Expo Go uses dev mode; SDK 54 core + RN 0.81 + React 19 + 242 routes = ~37MB minimum
- **Render API credentials not in env** ‚Äî cannot manually trigger Render deploy; relying on auto-deploy from GitHub push

## Key Decisions
- OTA crash fix strategy: `updates.enabled: false` + `checkAutomatically: 'NEVER'` in `app.config.ts` prevents native-level update checking (the fatal crash source); JS-level `safelyCheckForUpdates()` provides optional non-fatal checking via dynamic import
- `expo-updates` removed from dependencies: native `expo-updates-gradle-plugin` requires Kotlin 1.9.0 but RN 0.81 gradle plugin compiled with Kotlin 2.1.0 ‚Äî incompatible; JS code uses dynamic `import('expo-updates')` which gracefully fails if module absent
- `eas.json` channels added: `development`, `preview`, `production` ‚Äî required for EAS Update channel-to-branch mapping
- `runtimeVersion: { policy: 'appVersion' }` added to `app.config.ts` ‚Äî links APK version to OTA update compatibility
- `android.versionCode` incremented 1 ‚Üí 2 ‚Äî Android treats as new version, replacing broken APK
- Fake watchman binary (`/tmp/fake-bin/watchman`) returns synthetic JSON for `get-sockname`, `watch-project`, `version` commands ‚Äî unblocks Metro cold builds in cloud sandbox with `nice_value=19`
- Samsung keyboard fix: `useWebKeyboard` hook uses `window.visualViewport` resize/scroll events with 80px threshold; `injectWebKeyboardCSS()` injects `<style id="ivx-web-keyboard-fix">` with `touch-action: manipulation`, `user-select: text`, `100dvh`/`100svh`, `env(safe-area-inset-bottom)`
- Web-only CSS properties on TextInput styles use `...(Platform.OS === 'web' ? ({ touchAction: 'manipulation', userSelect: 'text', WebkitUserSelect: 'text', outlineStyle: 'none' } as any) : {})` pattern
- Deferred owner AI modules from startup: `setTimeout(() => { require(...) }, 3000)` in `_layout.tsx` useEffect
- CORS allowlist: `IVX_ALLOWED_ORIGINS` array in `hono.ts` ‚Äî Hono `cors()` returns `null` for non-allowlisted origins

## Next Steps
- Check if Gradle build completed ‚Äî look for APK at `android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk`
- If APK built: verify it exists, check file size, copy to accessible location for user download
- If APK failed: read full error from `/tmp/gradle-build3.log` and fix
- Once APK is available: user must uninstall old IVX APK, install new one, test offline (airplane mode), test online
- Test Samsung Internet keyboard at `chat.ivxholding.com/home` on real device
- Push commit `3e501cd` to GitHub (need GitHub remote configured or manual push from user machine)
- Redeploy landing HTML to S3 (requires AWS credentials)
- Verify `www.ivxholding.com` 301 redirect (requires Cloudflare DNS change)

## Critical Context
- Git: `main` branch, HEAD `3e501cd` (OTA repair + keyboard fix), pushed to origin (Rork internal) but NOT pushed to GitHub
- APK build: PID 55
